summary: Iteration 2 testing completed successfully. All new features working correctly: JWT authentication system (login/register/logout), search and filter functionality, CSV export, and MetaMask error suppression. Backend API expanded with auth endpoints achieving 100% success rate. Frontend authentication modal, search bar, risk filters, and favorites system all fully functional.
passed_tests: MetaMask extension error suppression working (no console errors)
Admin login with admin@morgana.com / Morgana2026! successful
User registration creates new accounts with unique emails
Duplicate registration properly returns 400 error
Invalid login credentials return 401 error
GET /api/auth/me returns user data with valid Bearer token
GET /api/auth/me returns 401 with invalid token
Auth modal opens from sidebar login button
Auth modal login/register tabs switch correctly
Auth modal successful login shows user name in sidebar
Logout button clears user state and shows login button
Search bar filters cacerías by name (e.g. 'value' shows C2)
Search bar filters by filter names (e.g. ROE shows matching cacerías)
Risk filter dropdown filters by risk profile (Alto shows C3, C6)
No results state displays when no cacerías match search
Favorites work when authenticated (user-scoped in MongoDB)
Favorites work when not authenticated (anonymous in MongoDB)
CSV export button appears when favorites exist
CSV export downloads morgana_favoritos.csv file correctly
TradingView widget integration still working
Navigation between sections still functional
All previous iteration 1 features still working
